import pytest
from source import max_sublist_sum

def test_max_sublist_sum_rejects_negative_prefix():
    """The algorithm must reset the running sum when it becomes negative."""
    arr = [4, -5, 2, 1, -1, 3]
    expected = 5  # subarray [2, 1, -1, 3] gives the maximum sum
    result = max_sublist_sum(arr)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result} on input {arr}"
